config.user_description: Add a 'Productivity - Calculator' section that compares three ways of building software (human, fully-automatic, semi-automatic), visualizes the process (possibly with on-the-fly SVG), and lets users calculate cycle time from 'something happens' to 'deployed in production'.
config.special_instructions: ASK ME IF YOU'RE NOT SURE!

discovery.test_command: backend: cd backend && npx playwright test | frontend: cd frontend && npx ng test

decisions.time_model: per-step durations (work + wait per step, all three processes)
decisions.persistence: save named scenarios to backend (table + API)
